narrative:
## Canopy roadmap

Canopy is the team's working memory: agents propose context through a reconciling gate and humans confirm the consequential changes. 

**Now** we're hardening trustworthy capture (staged writes, replay-safe events) and the read-side brain (ranked FTS across docs, decisions, feed, and roadmap). **Next** is making the personal surfaces earn their keep — structured My Work summaries and a roadmap that reads itself against reality. **Later** we open the store up: semantic search over Vectorize and a self-host path.

milestones.title: MCP write contract — GA
milestones.description: Typed, staged-only writes for every agent over MCP.

milestones.title: Reconciling gate + replay ledger
milestones.description: Content-hash dedupe, change-typing, and a per-item replay ledger.

milestones.title: Token rotation & audit log
milestones.description: Constant-time comparison, revoke, and a read trail.

milestones.title: Structured My Work summaries
milestones.description: Capture-time structured PR/issue summaries rendered on the dashboard cards.

milestones.title: Roadmap reads itself against reality
milestones.description: read-plan checks the authored plan against captured events and progress.

milestones.title: Semantic search ranking
milestones.description: Mixed feed/doc results ordered by meaning, not match, via Vectorize + RRF.

milestones.title: Self-host & deploy guide
milestones.description: Run the whole store on your own Cloudflare account.
